nearestLessons.emptyDescription: No lessons scheduled in the next {{days}} days

onboarding.sidebar: Use the left panel to open Home, Classrooms, Materials, or Payment control
onboarding.userProfileTutor: In settings you can change your email and password, connect messengers for notifications, and configure your equipment for video calls with students
onboarding.userProfileStudent: In settings you can change your email and password, connect messengers for notifications, and configure video calls
onboarding.classrooms: A classroom is a virtual space for learning. There you will find materials, the schedule, and payment information
onboarding.inviteLinksStudent: Follow invitation links from tutors to add new classrooms
onboarding.inviteStudent: Send an invitation link to a student
onboarding.createGroup:
Or create a group and invite students with a shared link.
If you schedule a group lesson, every student in the group will get a notification. Group materials are available to all members
onboarding.materials: Store online boards and notes in Materials
onboarding.payments: Payment control helps you track all finances on the platform: upcoming, completed, and overdue payments
onboarding.createInvoice:
To get paid for a lesson, issue an invoice to the student.
If the student does not pay, you will not need to remind them: they will receive an automatic overdue payment notification
onboarding.hintsTutor:
If you need help, click here to review the tips again, or contact support.
Good luck!
The sovlium team
onboarding.hintsStudent:
If you need help, review the tips again or contact support.
Happy learning!
The sovlium team
